caption:
Let's talk about what actually happens when Botox meets your muscles.

Botulinum toxin type A works by temporarily blocking acetylcholine—the neurotransmitter that tells your muscles to contract. When those signals pause, the muscles that create dynamic wrinkles (think: forehead lines, crow's feet, the "11s" between your brows) gradually relax.

The precision matters. Our injectors map your facial anatomy to target only the muscles responsible for unwanted movement—preserving your natural expressions while softening the patterns that age you.

Results begin appearing within 3-5 days, with full effect at 10-14 days. Duration: 3-4 months for most patients.

Science, not guesswork. Artistry, not assembly line.

Ready to see what precision Botox looks like? Book your consultation today.
mediaDescription: Elegant educational carousel: Slide 1 shows a refined anatomical illustration of facial muscles with gold overlay lines. Slide 2 diagrams the mechanism of action. Slide 3 shows a timeline of results. Clean, clinical-luxe design with Rani branding.
